task: Block 1 — Dispatch Overview command center (default view)
details: DispatchOverview.tsx: 4 KPIs (active loads, at-risk/late, units available, units needing return) + 6 drill-in panels.
Panels: Unassigned units, Round-trip exposure, At-Risk queue, Detention board, Border crossings, Out-of-service.
Each panel row shows unit + driver + load/customer; header View all routes to full view.
Dispatch.tsx: register overview as default view segment alongside Kanban and List.
Read-only counts from existing dispatch/queue endpoints in api/dispatch.ts (border via apiRequest inline).
